Dialog.name: SEL_BACK_UP_02
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What is the status of the target?

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_BACK_UP_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll support you all from here. Is there anything I can do for you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_BACK_UP_RE_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is there anything else?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I believe the highest you've gotten is floor {f 2 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_GO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}For now, please try going as high up as you can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_STOP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}We managed to get as far as we can for the time being. I guess we can say mission accomplished?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Great job, everybody.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_STOP_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've climbed to the very top of the tower, so we accomplished our objective, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}After everything we've gone through, we couldn't find anything in Tartarus—not even a single clue.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}But why... do I feel so uneasy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_STOP_5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}We've climbed as far as we can go for now... But it seems like there's still quite a ways to go before we're done.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wonder what lies ahead...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_STOP_L
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Looks like we've gotten as far as we can go.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess all we have to do now is wait until January 31st...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_THEURGIA_BEFORE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}I'll be here to provide backup from now on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}When I'm geared up just like everyone else, it really gets me psyched up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_MEMBER_LACK
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}It's dangerous to go with the party as is. Please add more teammates to your lineup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_LETS_GO_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please be careful out there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_BACK_UP_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}I sense that... the enemies are even stronger than last time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Brace yourselves for some tough battles ahead. I'll also do my best to support you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_BACK_UP_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I'm sorry. I shouldn't be hesitating at a time like this...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_BACK_UP_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}Even though he's all alone, he'll still stand against us...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's head out once we've finished our preparations. He should be waiting for us up ahead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_BACK_UP_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}We finally made it... We finally conquered this tower.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_BACK_UP_06
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just a little farther...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Until our final battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_BACK_UP_07
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}Let's focus on the Shadow right now. Please choose who will join you on the front lines.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm picking up the target's signal from a spot somewhere below here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}But it's kind of like... multiple readings overlapping? I can't really tell for sure.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}What on earth could it be...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}We don't know what we're up against this time either, so be ready for anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_LETS_GO_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll get ready to provide support, so you can head on over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_BACK_UP_08
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}This will be our final battle... Let's get through this, together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ANALYSIS_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Shadow is floating in the air, showing no signs of movement.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}If we get close, it'll turn into a bloodbath. Make sure you're fully prepared for battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0613_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5006 0 0}From now on, I'll be providing support in Kirijo-senpai's stead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll do my best to make exploration easier on everyone in any way I can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0623_0707_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}Little by little, I'm starting to get used to providing support.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}You can count on me to have your back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0709_0717_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}The last battle really did a number on you the other day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The enemies have gotten stronger, too, so I'll do everything I can to support you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0718_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}I've only ever seen Yakushima in pictures, but I hear it's supposed to be a beautiful place. Isn't this exciting?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, but we have to focus on exploring Tartarus right now. Let's pull it together and move out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0724_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}I wonder how they managed to build Aigis...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Kirijo Group's technology is really impressive— Oh, um, sorry. Now's not the time to be thinking about all that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0725_0805_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Amada-kun is really put together. And he speaks so politely, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sure his parents really cared about him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0806_0809_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Having to attend summer school is... kind of depressing, honestly.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}But maybe I'll be able to concentrate with everyone around. Let's just do our best.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0810_0820_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}Looks like I'll be able to provide Koro-chan backup the same way I do for everyone else.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}He seems to understand human speech, and we're all able to figure out what he's feeling.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}He's a really smart dog. Isn't that right, Koro-chan?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0821_0827_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Summer vacation really went by in a flash, didn't it? This year especially...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I guess maybe that's because we were busy every day, one way or another.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0828_0902_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Amada-kun sure is amazing, isn't he? Even though he's so young, he's really determined.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It makes me want to do my best to support him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0903_0904_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}Now that Aragaki-senpai's joined us, we've gained even more firepower.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}I guess that only makes choosing your party lineup harder, but this is something only a leader can do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0906_0918_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}It seems that Kirijo-senpai is also looking into Strega.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I wonder... Just where did that girl get an Evoker?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0919_1003_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}Now there's just three Shadows remaining...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The end of our battle is in sight. I'll back you up, all the way to the very end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1005_1016_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5089 0 0}Sanada-senpai and Amada-kun are starting to pick themselves up. We should follow their example...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'll be all right. As always, I'll provide backup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1019_1102_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}Once we defeat the next Shadow, Tartarus should disappear for good.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Keep up the hard work, and don't lose focus until the very end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1106_1109_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5089 0 0}Just what have we been doing all this time...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}We believed that this was it, that this would be the end...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1110_1117_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5089 0 0}There's no way Kirijo-senpai's okay... considering everything that happened.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'm worried about her, but giving her some space might be what's best for now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1121_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}If you're sorry about what happened during the school trip, it's okay. I'm not upset anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Since Kirijo-senpai, um... executed you guys on our behalf.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, let's focus on the task at hand and get back to exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1121_FUKA_DUNGE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}It looks like Kirijo-senpai's recovered... Thank goodness.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}I knew she could overcome her grief.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1122_1127_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}I've been trying to think of something that could make him feel better, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}...I guess it's not easy to bounce back after what happened.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1203_1213_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5089 0 0}I can't stop thinking about Ryoji-kun's words...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sorry, I'll try to concentrate.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1219_1225_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5096 0 0}I know things are tense right now, but I'm really looking forward to Christmas...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Because... I want to spend it with you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 1 0}S-Sorry... I just feel so flustered even though I'm the one who said all that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0101_0114_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}The Promised Day is fast approaching...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I can't let my nerves get the best of me right now... Let's go about this like usual.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0115_0130_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}We'll do everything we can to protect our ordinary, everyday lives and our future— No, we must.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}We don't have much time left until the Promised Day. Let's keep building up our strength for the final battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0131_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}It's the Promised Day... The day we fight Nyx for our future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}As long as we stand together, I believe we can overcome anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's make it through this, make it to tomorrow... so we can meet up on graduation day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HANYOU1_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5075 0 0}On days we go to Tartarus, I have a smaller dinner.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}I get really sleepy after eating a big meal.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, I'm not tired right now though. You don't have to worry about me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HANYOU1_FUKA_DUNGE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Every few floors, the Shadows seem a little different.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It might be a good idea to change up your party lineup every now and then. That way, it'll be easier to target an enemy's weakness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HANYOU2_FUKA_DUNGE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}I always find it thrilling whenever everyone attacks the Shadows all at once.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}You should execute those attacks when you get the chance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_HANYOU2_FUKA_DUNGE_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Everyone on standby is also warming up for their turn.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}We'll be able to swap out teammates at any time, so please try not to overexert yourself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_LOVER_INPARTY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}It... It'd be too embarrassing if you could hear how loudly my heart is beating.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_TODAY_COMMU
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}Looks like we'll be together the whole day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}Hehe, let's explore as much as we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_FUKA_ZEKKOCHO
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}I'm feeling pretty good today. I'll be sure to support everyone as best as I can![n]{f 1 1}
